toolUseResult.content:
# Azure DevOps Pipeline for BizBio
# This pipeline builds, tests, and deploys both:
# - BizBio ASP.NET Core API
# - SnapTap/BizBio Nuxt UI

trigger:
  branches:
    include:
    - main
    - develop
    - feature/*
  paths:
    exclude:
    - README.md
    - docs/*
    - .github/*

pr:
  branches:
    include:
    - main
    - develop

variables:
  # API Variables
  buildConfiguration: 'Release'
  dotnetVersion: '8.x'
  projectPath: 'src/BizBio.API/BizBio.API.csproj'
  solutionPath: 'BizBio.sln'

  # UI Variables
  nodeVersion: '20.x'
  uiWorkingDirectory: '$(Build.SourcesDirectory)/src/BizBio.UI'

  # Deployment Variables
  uiTargetDirectory: '/var/www/snaptap/ui'

# ============================================================================
# STAGE: BUILD
# ============================================================================
stages:
- stage: Build
  displayName: 'Build and Test'
  jobs:
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # JOB: Build API
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - job: BuildAPI
    displayName: 'Build API'
    pool:
      vmImage: 'ubuntu-latest'

    steps:
    - task: UseDotNet@2
      displayName: 'Install .NET SDK'
      inputs:
        version: $(dotnetVersion)
        includePreviewVersions: false

    - task: DotNetCoreCLI@2
      displayName: 'Restore Dependencies'
      inputs:
        command: 'restore'
        projects: '$(solutionPath)'

    - task: DotNetCoreCLI@2
      displayName: 'Build Solution'
      inputs:
        command: 'build'
        projects: '$(solutionPath)'
        arguments: '--configuration $(buildConfiguration) --no-restore'

    # Uncomment when tests are added
    # - task: DotNetCoreCLI@2
    #   displayName: 'Run Tests'
    #   inputs:
    #     command: 'test'
    #     projects: '**/*Tests/*.csproj'
    #     arguments: '--configuration $(buildConfiguration) --no-build --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage"'

    - task: DotNetCoreCLI@2
      displayName: 'Publish API'
      inputs:
        command: 'publish'
        publishWebProjects: false
        projects: '$(projectPath)'
        arguments: '--configuration $(buildConfiguration) --output $(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)/api --no-build'
        zipAfterPublish: true

    - task: CopyFiles@2
      displayName: 'Copy Deployment Scripts'
      inputs:
        SourceFolder: '$(System.DefaultWorkingDirectory)'
        Contents: |
          deploy/**
        TargetFolder: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)'

    - task: PublishBuildArtifacts@1
      displayName: 'Publish API Artifacts'
      inputs:
        PathtoPublish: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)'
        ArtifactName: 'api-build'
        publishLocation: 'Container'

  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # JOB: Build UI
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - job: BuildUI
    displayName: 'Build UI'
    pool:
      vmImage: 'ubuntu-latest'

    steps:
    - task: NodeTool@0
      displayName: 'Install Node.js $(nodeVersion)'
      inputs:
        versionSpec: $(nodeVersion)

    - task: Cache@2
      displayName: 'Cache node_modules'
      inputs:
        key: 'npm | "$(Agent.OS)" | $(uiWorkingDirectory)/package-lock.json'
        path: '$(uiWorkingDirectory)/node_modules'
        restoreKeys: |
          npm | "$(Agent.OS)"

    - script: |
        cd $(uiWorkingDirectory)
        npm ci
      displayName: 'Install Dependencies'

    - script: |
        cd $(uiWorkingDirectory)
        npm run build
      displayName: 'Build Application'
      env:
        NODE_ENV: production

    # Verify build output
    - script: |
        echo "=== Build Output Structure ==="
        ls -la $(uiWorkingDirectory)/.output/
        echo "=== Public folder ==="
        ls -la $(uiWorkingDirectory)/.output/public/ | head -20
        echo "=== Profile Assets ==="
        ls -la $(uiWorkingDirectory)/.output/public/profile-assets/ || echo "profile-assets not found"
      displayName: 'Verify Build Output'

    # Archive the .output directory
    - task: ArchiveFiles@2
      displayName: 'Archive Build Output'
      inputs:
        rootFolderOrFile: '$(uiWorkingDirectory)/.output'
        includeRootFolder: false
        archiveType: 'zip'
        archiveFile: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)/ui.zip'
        replaceExistingArchive: true

    # Copy ecosystem config
    - task: CopyFiles@2
      displayName: 'Copy ecosystem.config.cjs'
      inputs:
        SourceFolder: '$(uiWorkingDirectory)'
        Contents: 'ecosystem.config.cjs'
        TargetFolder: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)/config'

    # Copy nginx config
    - task: CopyFiles@2
      displayName: 'Copy Nginx Config'
      inputs:
        SourceFolder: '$(uiWorkingDirectory)/nginx'
        Contents: '*.conf'
        TargetFolder: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)/config/nginx'

    # Copy deployment scripts
    - task: CopyFiles@2
      displayName: 'Copy Deployment Scripts'
      inputs:
        SourceFolder: '$(uiWorkingDirectory)/scripts'
        Contents: '*.sh'
        TargetFolder: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)/scripts'

    # Publish artifacts
    - task: PublishBuildArtifacts@1
      displayName: 'Publish UI Artifacts'
      inputs:
        PathtoPublish: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)'
        ArtifactName: 'ui-build'
        publishLocation: 'Container'

# ============================================================================
# STAGE: Deploy to Development
# ============================================================================
- stage: DeployDev
  displayName: 'Deploy to Development'
  dependsOn: Build
  condition: and(succeeded(), eq(variables['Build.SourceBranch'], 'refs/heads/develop'))
  jobs:
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # JOB: Deploy API to Dev
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - deployment: DeployAPIDev
    displayName: 'Deploy API to Dev'
    environment: 'Development'
    pool:
      vmImage: 'ubuntu-latest'
    strategy:
      runOnce:
        deploy:
          steps:
          - task: DownloadBuildArtifacts@0
            displayName: 'Download API Artifacts'
            inputs:
              buildType: 'current'
              downloadType: 'single'
              artifactName: 'api-build'
              downloadPath: '$(System.ArtifactsDirectory)'

          - task: Bash@3
            displayName: 'Deploy API via SSH'
            inputs:
              targetType: 'inline'
              script: |
                # Install SSH key
                mkdir -p ~/.ssh
                echo "$(SSH_PRIVATE_KEY)" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                ssh-keyscan -H $(VPS_HOST) >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

                # Create deployment directory on VPS
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) "mkdir -p /tmp/bizbio-deploy"

                # Copy artifacts to VPS
                scp -r $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/api-build/api/* $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):/tmp/bizbio-deploy/

                # Execute deployment script on VPS
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) << 'ENDSSH'
                  set -e

                  # Stop the service
                  sudo systemctl stop bizbio-api || true

                  # Backup current deployment
                  if [ -d /var/www/bizbio-api ]; then
                    sudo cp -r /var/www/bizbio-api /var/www/bizbio-api.backup.$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
                  fi

                  # Deploy new version
                  sudo mkdir -p /var/www/bizbio-api
                  sudo unzip -o /tmp/bizbio-deploy/BizBio.API.zip -d /var/www/bizbio-api/

                  # Set permissions
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/bizbio-api
                  sudo chmod -R 755 /var/www/bizbio-api

                  # Ensure uploads directory exists
                  sudo mkdir -p /var/www/uploads
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/uploads

                  # Start the service
                  sudo systemctl start bizbio-api
                  sudo systemctl status bizbio-api

                  # Cleanup
                  rm -rf /tmp/bizbio-deploy
                ENDSSH

                # Verify deployment
                echo "Waiting for service to start..."
                sleep 10
                curl -f https://api.bizbio.co.za/health || exit 1
                echo "API Deployment successful!"

  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # JOB: Deploy UI to Dev
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - deployment: DeployUIDev
    displayName: 'Deploy UI to Dev'
    environment: 'Development'
    pool:
      vmImage: 'ubuntu-latest'
    strategy:
      runOnce:
        deploy:
          steps:
          - task: DownloadBuildArtifacts@0
            displayName: 'Download UI Artifacts'
            inputs:
              buildType: 'current'
              downloadType: 'single'
              artifactName: 'ui-build'
              downloadPath: '$(System.ArtifactsDirectory)'

          - task: Bash@3
            displayName: 'Deploy UI via SSH'
            inputs:
              targetType: 'inline'
              script: |
                # Install SSH key
                mkdir -p ~/.ssh
                echo "$(SSH_PRIVATE_KEY)" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                ssh-keyscan -H $(VPS_HOST) >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

                RELEASE_ID=$(Build.BuildId)
                TARGET_DIR="$(uiTargetDirectory)"

                # Create release directory
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) "mkdir -p ${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}"

                # Upload artifacts
                scp $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/ui-build/ui.zip $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}/
                scp $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/ui-build/config/ecosystem.config.cjs $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}/ 2>/dev/null || true
                scp $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/ui-build/config/nginx/*.conf $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}/ 2>/dev/null || true

                # Execute deployment
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) << ENDSSH
                  set -e

                  TARGET_DIR="${TARGET_DIR}"
                  RELEASE_ID="${RELEASE_ID}"
                  RELEASE_DIR="\${TARGET_DIR}/releases/\${RELEASE_ID}"

                  echo "=========================================="
                  echo "SnapTap UI Dev Deployment - Release \${RELEASE_ID}"
                  echo "=========================================="

                  # Extract build
                  cd \${RELEASE_DIR}
                  unzip -q ui.zip -d ui-build
                  rm ui.zip

                  # Update ecosystem config
                  if [ -f "\${RELEASE_DIR}/ecosystem.config.cjs" ]; then
                    cp \${RELEASE_DIR}/ecosystem.config.cjs \${TARGET_DIR}/ecosystem.config.cjs
                  fi

                  # Backup current
                  if [ -L \${TARGET_DIR}/current ]; then
                    sudo rm -dfr \${TARGET_DIR}/previous || true
                    mv \${TARGET_DIR}/current \${TARGET_DIR}/previous
                  fi

                  # Create symlink
                  sudo ln -sfn \${RELEASE_DIR}/ui-build/. \${TARGET_DIR}/current

                  # Set permissions
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data \${TARGET_DIR}/current

                  # Ensure directories exist
                  mkdir -p \${TARGET_DIR}/profiles
                  mkdir -p \${TARGET_DIR}/logs

                  # Reload PM2
                  cd \${TARGET_DIR}
                  if pm2 list | grep -q "snaptap-frontend"; then
                    pm2 reload ecosystem.config.cjs --only snaptap-frontend --env production
                  else
                    pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --only snaptap-frontend --env production
                  fi
                  pm2 save

                  # Cleanup old releases (keep last 5)
                  cd \${TARGET_DIR}/releases
                  ls -dt */ | tail -n +6 | xargs -r rm -rf

                  echo "Dev deployment complete!"
                ENDSSH

                # Verify
                sleep 5
                echo "UI Dev Deployment complete!"

# ============================================================================
# STAGE: Deploy to Production
# ============================================================================
- stage: DeployProd
  displayName: 'Deploy to Production'
  dependsOn: Build
  condition: and(succeeded(), eq(variables['Build.SourceBranch'], 'refs/heads/main'))
  jobs:
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # JOB: Deploy API to Production
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - deployment: DeployAPIProd
    displayName: 'Deploy API to Production'
    environment: 'Production'
    pool:
      vmImage: 'ubuntu-latest'
    strategy:
      runOnce:
        deploy:
          steps:
          - task: DownloadBuildArtifacts@0
            displayName: 'Download API Artifacts'
            inputs:
              buildType: 'current'
              downloadType: 'single'
              artifactName: 'api-build'
              downloadPath: '$(System.ArtifactsDirectory)'

          - task: Bash@3
            displayName: 'Deploy API to Production VPS'
            inputs:
              targetType: 'inline'
              script: |
                # Install SSH key
                mkdir -p ~/.ssh
                echo "$(SSH_PRIVATE_KEY)" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                ssh-keyscan -H $(VPS_HOST) >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

                # Create deployment directory on VPS
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) "mkdir -p /tmp/bizbio-deploy"

                # Copy artifacts to VPS
                scp -r $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/api-build/api/* $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):/tmp/bizbio-deploy/

                # Execute deployment script on VPS
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) << 'ENDSSH'
                  set -e

                  echo "Starting API deployment to Production..."

                  # Stop the service
                  sudo systemctl stop bizbio-api || true

                  # Backup current deployment
                  if [ -d /var/www/bizbio-api ]; then
                    sudo cp -r /var/www/bizbio-api /var/www/bizbio-api.backup.$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)

                    # Keep only last 5 backups
                    cd /var/www
                    ls -t bizbio-api.backup.* 2>/dev/null | tail -n +6 | xargs -r sudo rm -rf
                  fi

                  # Deploy new version
                  sudo mkdir -p /var/www/bizbio-api
                  sudo unzip -o /tmp/bizbio-deploy/BizBio.API.zip -d /var/www/bizbio-api/

                  # Set permissions
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/bizbio-api
                  sudo chmod -R 755 /var/www/bizbio-api

                  # Ensure uploads directory exists
                  sudo mkdir -p /var/www/uploads
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/uploads

                  # Run database migrations
                  echo "Running database migrations..."
                  cd /var/www/bizbio-api
                  # sudo -u www-data dotnet BizBio.API.dll ef database update

                  # Start the service
                  echo "Starting bizbio-api service..."
                  sudo systemctl start bizbio-api

                  # Wait for service to start
                  sleep 5

                  # Check service status
                  sudo systemctl status bizbio-api --no-pager

                  # Cleanup
                  rm -rf /tmp/bizbio-deploy

                  echo "API Deployment completed successfully!"
                ENDSSH

                # Verify deployment
                echo "Verifying API deployment..."
                sleep 10

                # Test the API health endpoint
                if curl -f https://api.bizbio.co.za/health; then
                  echo "✅ API Production deployment successful!"
                else
                  echo "❌ API Health check failed!"
                  exit 1
                fi

  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # JOB: Deploy UI to Production
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - deployment: DeployUIProd
    displayName: 'Deploy UI to Production'
    environment: 'Production'
    pool:
      vmImage: 'ubuntu-latest'
    strategy:
      runOnce:
        deploy:
          steps:
          - task: DownloadBuildArtifacts@0
            displayName: 'Download UI Artifacts'
            inputs:
              buildType: 'current'
              downloadType: 'single'
              artifactName: 'ui-build'
              downloadPath: '$(System.ArtifactsDirectory)'

          - task: Bash@3
            displayName: 'Deploy UI to Production VPS'
            inputs:
              targetType: 'inline'
              script: |
                # Install SSH key
                mkdir -p ~/.ssh
                echo "$(SSH_PRIVATE_KEY)" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                ssh-keyscan -H $(VPS_HOST) >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

                RELEASE_ID=$(Build.BuildId)
                TARGET_DIR="$(uiTargetDirectory)"

                echo "=========================================="
                echo "SnapTap UI Production Deployment"
                echo "Release: ${RELEASE_ID}"
                echo "=========================================="

                # Create release directory
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) "mkdir -p ${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}"

                # Upload artifacts
                echo ">>> Uploading build artifacts..."
                scp $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/ui-build/ui.zip $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}/

                # Upload configs
                scp $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/ui-build/config/ecosystem.config.cjs $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}/ 2>/dev/null || true
                scp $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/ui-build/config/nginx/*.conf $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}/ 2>/dev/null || true

                # Execute deployment
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) << ENDSSH
                  set -e

                  TARGET_DIR="${TARGET_DIR}"
                  RELEASE_ID="${RELEASE_ID}"
                  RELEASE_DIR="\${TARGET_DIR}/releases/\${RELEASE_ID}"

                  echo "=========================================="
                  echo "Deploying Release \${RELEASE_ID}"
                  echo "=========================================="

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 1. Extract build artifact
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Extracting build artifact..."
                  cd \${RELEASE_DIR}
                  unzip -q ui.zip -d ui-build
                  rm ui.zip

                  echo ">>> Build contents:"
                  ls -la \${RELEASE_DIR}/ui-build/

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 2. Update Nginx configuration
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Checking Nginx configuration..."
                  if [ -f "\${RELEASE_DIR}/snaptap.co.za.conf" ]; then
                    echo ">>> Updating Nginx config..."
                    sudo cp \${RELEASE_DIR}/snaptap.co.za.conf /etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap.co.za
                    sudo nginx -t
                    if [ \$? -eq 0 ]; then
                      sudo systemctl reload nginx
                      echo ">>> Nginx configuration updated and reloaded"
                    else
                      echo ">>> ERROR: Nginx config test failed, keeping old config"
                      exit 1
                    fi
                  else
                    echo ">>> No nginx config in release, keeping existing"
                  fi

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 3. Update ecosystem.config.cjs
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Updating PM2 ecosystem config..."
                  if [ -f "\${RELEASE_DIR}/ecosystem.config.cjs" ]; then
                    cp \${RELEASE_DIR}/ecosystem.config.cjs \${TARGET_DIR}/ecosystem.config.cjs
                    echo ">>> Ecosystem config updated"
                  fi

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 4. Backup current release
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Managing release symlinks..."
                  if [ -L \${TARGET_DIR}/current ]; then
                    CURRENT_TARGET=\$(readlink \${TARGET_DIR}/current)
                    echo ">>> Current points to: \${CURRENT_TARGET}"
                    echo ">>> Backing up current to previous..."
                    sudo rm -dfr \${TARGET_DIR}/previous || true
                    mv \${TARGET_DIR}/current \${TARGET_DIR}/previous
                  fi

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 5. Create symlink to new release
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Creating symlink to new release..."
                  sudo ln -sfn \${RELEASE_DIR}/ui-build/. \${TARGET_DIR}/current

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 6. Set permissions
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Setting permissions..."
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data \${TARGET_DIR}/current

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 7. Ensure profiles directory exists
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Ensuring profiles directory exists..."
                  if [ ! -d "\${TARGET_DIR}/profiles" ]; then
                    sudo mkdir -p \${TARGET_DIR}/profiles
                    sudo chown -R www-data:www-data \${TARGET_DIR}/profiles
                    echo ">>> Created profiles directory"
                  fi

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 8. Ensure logs directory exists
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Ensuring logs directory exists..."
                  mkdir -p \${TARGET_DIR}/logs

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 9. Reload PM2
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Reloading PM2..."
                  cd \${TARGET_DIR}

                  if pm2 list | grep -q "snaptap-frontend"; then
                    pm2 reload ecosystem.config.cjs --only snaptap-frontend --env production
                  else
                    pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --only snaptap-frontend --env production
                  fi
                  pm2 save

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 10. Cleanup old releases (keep last 5)
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Cleaning up old releases..."
                  cd \${TARGET_DIR}/releases
                  ls -dt */ | tail -n +6 | xargs -r rm -rf
                  echo ">>> Remaining releases:"
                  ls -la \${TARGET_DIR}/releases/

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 11. Verify deployment
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Verifying deployment..."
                  sleep 3

                  # Check if app is responding
                  HTTP_CODE=\$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3001/ || echo "000")
                  if [ "\$HTTP_CODE" = "200" ]; then
                    echo ">>> Application is responding (HTTP \${HTTP_CODE})"
                  else
                    echo ">>> WARNING: Application returned HTTP \${HTTP_CODE}"
                    echo ">>> Checking PM2 logs..."
                    pm2 logs snaptap-frontend --lines 20 --nostream
                  fi

                  # Check static asset
                  ASSET_CODE=\$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3001/profile-assets/bizbio-engine.js || echo "000")
                  if [ "\$ASSET_CODE" = "200" ]; then
                    echo ">>> Profile assets are accessible (HTTP \${ASSET_CODE})"
                  else
                    echo ">>> WARNING: Profile assets returned HTTP \${ASSET_CODE}"
                  fi

                  echo "=========================================="
                  echo "UI Deployment Complete!"
                  echo "=========================================="
                  echo "Release: \${RELEASE_ID}"
                  echo "Current: \${TARGET_DIR}/current -> \$(readlink \${TARGET_DIR}/current)"
                  echo "=========================================="
                  pm2 status snaptap-frontend
                ENDSSH

                # Final verification from outside
                echo ">>> Final verification..."
                sleep 5

                if curl -sf https://www.snaptap.co.za/ > /dev/null; then
                  echo "✅ SnapTap UI Production deployment successful!"
                else
                  echo "⚠️ External health check warning (may be expected for new setup)"
                fi

          - task: Bash@3
            displayName: 'Notify Deployment Success'
            condition: succeeded()
            inputs:
              targetType: 'inline'
              script: |
                echo "=========================================="
                echo "Production Deployment Summary"
                echo "=========================================="
                echo "Completed at: $(date)"
                echo "Build: $(Build.BuildNumber)"
                echo "Commit: $(Build.SourceVersion)"
                echo "=========================================="
                echo ""
                echo "API:  https://api.bizbio.co.za"
                echo "UI:   https://www.snaptap.co.za"
                echo "=========================================="

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Azure DevOps Pipeline for BizBio API
# This pipeline builds, tests, and deploys the BizBio ASP.NET Core API to a VPS

trigger:
  branches:
    include:
    - main
    - develop
    - feature/*
  paths:
    exclude:
    - README.md
    - docs/*
    - .github/*

pr:
  branches:
    include:
    - main
    - develop

variables:
  buildConfiguration: 'Release'
  dotnetVersion: '8.x'
  projectPath: 'src/BizBio.API/BizBio.API.csproj'
  solutionPath: 'BizBio.sln'

stages:
- stage: Build
  displayName: 'Build and Test'
  jobs:
  - job: Build
    displayName: 'Build Job'
    pool:
      vmImage: 'ubuntu-latest'

    steps:
    - task: UseDotNet@2
      displayName: 'Install .NET SDK'
      inputs:
        version: $(dotnetVersion)
        includePreviewVersions: false

    - task: DotNetCoreCLI@2
      displayName: 'Restore Dependencies'
      inputs:
        command: 'restore'
        projects: '$(solutionPath)'

    - task: DotNetCoreCLI@2
      displayName: 'Build Solution'
      inputs:
        command: 'build'
        projects: '$(solutionPath)'
        arguments: '--configuration $(buildConfiguration) --no-restore'

    # Uncomment when tests are added
    # - task: DotNetCoreCLI@2
    #   displayName: 'Run Tests'
    #   inputs:
    #     command: 'test'
    #     projects: '**/*Tests/*.csproj'
    #     arguments: '--configuration $(buildConfiguration) --no-build --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage"'

    - task: DotNetCoreCLI@2
      displayName: 'Publish API'
      inputs:
        command: 'publish'
        publishWebProjects: false
        projects: '$(projectPath)'
        arguments: '--configuration $(buildConfiguration) --output $(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)/api --no-build'
        zipAfterPublish: true

    - task: CopyFiles@2
      displayName: 'Copy Deployment Scripts'
      inputs:
        SourceFolder: '$(System.DefaultWorkingDirectory)'
        Contents: |
          deploy/**
        TargetFolder: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)'

    - task: PublishBuildArtifacts@1
      displayName: 'Publish Artifacts'
      inputs:
        PathtoPublish: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)'
        ArtifactName: 'drop'
        publishLocation: 'Container'

# Deploy to Development/Staging Environment
- stage: DeployDev
  displayName: 'Deploy to Development'
  dependsOn: Build
  condition: and(succeeded(), eq(variables['Build.SourceBranch'], 'refs/heads/develop'))
  jobs:
  - deployment: DeployDev
    displayName: 'Deploy to Dev Server'
    environment: 'Development'
    pool:
      vmImage: 'ubuntu-latest'
    strategy:
      runOnce:
        deploy:
          steps:
          - task: DownloadBuildArtifacts@0
            displayName: 'Download Artifacts'
            inputs:
              buildType: 'current'
              downloadType: 'single'
              artifactName: 'drop'
              downloadPath: '$(System.ArtifactsDirectory)'

          - task: Bash@3
            displayName: 'Deploy to VPS via SSH'
            inputs:
              targetType: 'inline'
              script: |
                # Install SSH key
                mkdir -p ~/.ssh
                echo "$(SSH_PRIVATE_KEY)" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                ssh-keyscan -H $(VPS_HOST) >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

                # Create deployment directory on VPS
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) "mkdir -p /tmp/bizbio-deploy"

                # Copy artifacts to VPS
                scp -r $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/drop/api/* $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):/tmp/bizbio-deploy/

                # Execute deployment script on VPS
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) << 'ENDSSH'
                  set -e

                  # Stop the service
                  sudo systemctl stop bizbio-api || true

                  # Backup current deployment
                  if [ -d /var/www/bizbio-api ]; then
                    sudo cp -r /var/www/bizbio-api /var/www/bizbio-api.backup.$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
                  fi

                  # Deploy new version
                  sudo mkdir -p /var/www/bizbio-api
                  sudo unzip -o /tmp/bizbio-deploy/BizBio.API.zip -d /var/www/bizbio-api/

                  # Set permissions
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/bizbio-api
                  sudo chmod -R 755 /var/www/bizbio-api

                  # Ensure uploads directory exists
                  sudo mkdir -p /var/www/uploads
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/uploads

                  # Run database migrations (if needed)
                  # cd /var/www/bizbio-api
                  # sudo -u www-data dotnet BizBio.API.dll ef database update

                  # Start the service
                  sudo systemctl start bizbio-api
                  sudo systemctl status bizbio-api

                  # Cleanup
                  rm -rf /tmp/bizbio-deploy
                ENDSSH

                # Verify deployment
                echo "Waiting for service to start..."
                sleep 10

                # Test the API health endpoint
                curl -f https://api.bizbio.co.za/health || exit 1
                echo "Deployment successful!"

# Deploy to Production Environment
- stage: DeployProd
  displayName: 'Deploy to Production'
  dependsOn: Build
  condition: and(succeeded(), eq(variables['Build.SourceBranch'], 'refs/heads/main'))
  jobs:
  - deployment: DeployProd
    displayName: 'Deploy to Production Server'
    environment: 'Production'
    pool:
      vmImage: 'ubuntu-latest'
    strategy:
      runOnce:
        deploy:
          steps:
          - task: DownloadBuildArtifacts@0
            displayName: 'Download Artifacts'
            inputs:
              buildType: 'current'
              downloadType: 'single'
              artifactName: 'drop'
              downloadPath: '$(System.ArtifactsDirectory)'

          - task: Bash@3
            displayName: 'Deploy to Production VPS via SSH'
            inputs:
              targetType: 'inline'
              script: |
                # Install SSH key
                mkdir -p ~/.ssh
                echo "$(SSH_PRIVATE_KEY)" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                ssh-keyscan -H $(VPS_HOST) >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

                # Create deployment directory on VPS
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) "mkdir -p /tmp/bizbio-deploy"

                # Copy artifacts to VPS
                scp -r $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/drop/api/* $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):/tmp/bizbio-deploy/

                # Execute deployment script on VPS
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) << 'ENDSSH'
                  set -e

                  echo "Starting deployment to Production..."

                  # Stop the service
                  sudo systemctl stop bizbio-api || true

                  # Backup current deployment
                  if [ -d /var/www/bizbio-api ]; then
                    sudo cp -r /var/www/bizbio-api /var/www/bizbio-api.backup.$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)

                    # Keep only last 5 backups
                    cd /var/www
                    ls -t bizbio-api.backup.* 2>/dev/null | tail -n +6 | xargs -r sudo rm -rf
                  fi

                  # Deploy new version
                  sudo mkdir -p /var/www/bizbio-api
                  sudo unzip -o /tmp/bizbio-deploy/BizBio.API.zip -d /var/www/bizbio-api/

                  # Set permissions
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/bizbio-api
                  sudo chmod -R 755 /var/www/bizbio-api

                  # Ensure uploads directory exists
                  sudo mkdir -p /var/www/uploads
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/uploads

                  # Run database migrations
                  echo "Running database migrations..."
                  cd /var/www/bizbio-api
                  # sudo -u www-data dotnet BizBio.API.dll ef database update

                  # Start the service
                  echo "Starting bizbio-api service..."
                  sudo systemctl start bizbio-api

                  # Wait for service to start
                  sleep 5

                  # Check service status
                  sudo systemctl status bizbio-api --no-pager

                  # Cleanup
                  rm -rf /tmp/bizbio-deploy

                  echo "Deployment completed successfully!"
                ENDSSH

                # Verify deployment
                echo "Verifying deployment..."
                sleep 10

                # Test the API health endpoint
                if curl -f https://api.bizbio.co.za/health; then
                  echo "✅ Production deployment successful!"
                else
                  echo "❌ Health check failed!"
                  exit 1
                fi

          - task: Bash@3
            displayName: 'Notify Deployment Success'
            condition: succeeded()
            inputs:
              targetType: 'inline'
              script: |
                echo "Production deployment completed successfully at $(date)"
                echo "Build: $(Build.BuildNumber)"
                echo "Commit: $(Build.SourceVersion)"

   546→                  # --------------------------------------------
   547→                  echo ">>> Extracting build artifact..."
   548→                  cd \${RELEASE_DIR}
   549→                  unzip -q ui.zip -d ui-build
   550→                  rm ui.zip
   551→
   552→                  echo ">>> Build contents:"
   553→                  ls -la \${RELEASE_DIR}/ui-build/
   554→
   555→                  # --------------------------------------------
   556→                  # 2. Update Nginx configuration
   557→                  # --------------------------------------------
   558→                  echo ">>> Checking Nginx configuration..."
   559→                  if [ -f "\${RELEASE_DIR}/snaptap.co.za.conf" ]; then
   560→                    echo ">>> Updating Nginx config..."
   561→                    sudo cp \${RELEASE_DIR}/snaptap.co.za.conf /etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap.co.za
   562→                    sudo nginx -t
   563→                    if [ \$? -eq 0 ]; then
   564→                      sudo systemctl reload nginx
   565→                      echo ">>> Nginx configuration updated and reloaded"
   566→                    else
   567→                      echo ">>> ERROR: Nginx config test failed, keeping old config"
   568→                      exit 1
   569→                    fi
   570→                  else
   571→                    echo ">>> No nginx config in release, keeping existing"
   572→                  fi
   573→
   574→                  # --------------------------------------------
   575→                  # 3. Update ecosystem.config.cjs
   576→                  # --------------------------------------------
   577→                  echo ">>> Updating PM2 ecosystem config..."
   578→                  if [ -f "\${RELEASE_DIR}/ecosystem.config.cjs" ]; then
   579→                    cp \${RELEASE_DIR}/ecosystem.config.cjs \${TARGET_DIR}/ecosystem.config.cjs
   580→                    echo ">>> Ecosystem config updated"
   581→                  fi
   582→
   583→                  # --------------------------------------------
   584→                  # 4. Backup current release
   585→                  # --------------------------------------------
   586→                  echo ">>> Managing release symlinks..."
   587→                  if [ -L \${TARGET_DIR}/current ]; then
   588→                    CURRENT_TARGET=\$(readlink \${TARGET_DIR}/current)
   589→                    echo ">>> Current points to: \${CURRENT_TARGET}"
   590→                    echo ">>> Backing up current to previous..."
   591→                    sudo rm -dfr \${TARGET_DIR}/previous || true
   592→                    mv \${TARGET_DIR}/current \${TARGET_DIR}/previous
   593→                  fi
   594→
   595→                  # --------------------------------------------
   596→                  # 5. Create symlink to new release
   597→                  # --------------------------------------------
   598→                  echo ">>> Creating symlink to new release..."
   599→                  sudo ln -sfn \${RELEASE_DIR}/ui-build/. \${TARGET_DIR}/current
   600→
   601→                  # --------------------------------------------
   602→                  # 6. Set permissions
   603→                  # --------------------------------------------
   604→                  echo ">>> Setting permissions..."
   605→                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data \${TARGET_DIR}/current
   606→
   607→                  # --------------------------------------------
   608→                  # 7. Ensure profiles directory exists
   609→                  # --------------------------------------------
   610→                  echo ">>> Ensuring profiles directory exists..."
   611→                  if [ ! -d "\${TARGET_DIR}/profiles" ]; then
   612→                    sudo mkdir -p \${TARGET_DIR}/profiles
   613→                    sudo chown -R www-data:www-data \${TARGET_DIR}/profiles
   614→                    echo ">>> Created profiles directory"
   615→                  fi
   616→
   617→                  # --------------------------------------------
   618→                  # 8. Ensure logs directory exists
   619→                  # --------------------------------------------
   620→                  echo ">>> Ensuring logs directory exists..."
   621→                  mkdir -p \${TARGET_DIR}/logs
   622→
   623→                  # --------------------------------------------
   624→                  # 9. Reload PM2
   625→                  # --------------------------------------------
   626→                  echo ">>> Reloading PM2..."
   627→                  cd \${TARGET_DIR}
   628→
   629→                  if pm2 list | grep -q "snaptap-frontend"; then
   630→                    pm2 reload ecosystem.config.cjs --only snaptap-frontend --env production
   631→                  else
   632→                    pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --only snaptap-frontend --env production
   633→                  fi
   634→                  pm2 save
   635→
   636→                  # --------------------------------------------
   637→                  # 10. Cleanup old releases (keep last 5)
   638→                  # --------------------------------------------
   639→                  echo ">>> Cleaning up old releases..."
   640→                  cd \${TARGET_DIR}/releases
   641→                  ls -dt */ | tail -n +6 | xargs -r rm -rf
   642→                  echo ">>> Remaining releases:"
   643→                  ls -la \${TARGET_DIR}/releases/
   644→
   645→                  # --------------------------------------------
   646→                  # 11. Verify deployment
   647→                  # --------------------------------------------
   648→                  echo ">>> Verifying deployment..."
   649→                  sleep 3
   650→
   651→                  # Check if app is responding
   652→                  HTTP_CODE=\$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3001/ || echo "000")
   653→                  if [ "\$HTTP_CODE" = "200" ]; then
   654→                    echo ">>> Application is responding (HTTP \${HTTP_CODE})"
   655→                  else
   656→                    echo ">>> WARNING: Application returned HTTP \${HTTP_CODE}"
   657→                    echo ">>> Checking PM2 logs..."
   658→                    pm2 logs snaptap-frontend --lines 20 --nostream
   659→                  fi
   660→
   661→                  # Check static asset
   662→                  ASSET_CODE=\$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3001/profile-assets/bizbio-engine.js || echo "000")
   663→                  if [ "\$ASSET_CODE" = "200" ]; then
   664→                    echo ">>> Profile assets are accessible (HTTP \${ASSET_CODE})"
   665→                  else
   666→                    echo ">>> WARNING: Profile assets returned HTTP \${ASSET_CODE}"
   667→                  fi
   668→
   669→                  echo "=========================================="
   670→                  echo "UI Deployment Complete!"
   671→                  echo "=========================================="
   672→                  echo "Release: \${RELEASE_ID}"
   673→                  echo "Current: \${TARGET_DIR}/current -> \$(readlink \${TARGET_DIR}/current)"
   674→                  echo "=========================================="
   675→                  pm2 status snaptap-frontend
   676→                ENDSSH
   677→
   678→                # Final verification from outside
   679→                echo ">>> Final verification..."
   680→                sleep 5
   681→
   682→                if curl -sf https://www.snaptap.co.za/ > /dev/null; then
   683→                  echo "✅ SnapTap UI Production deployment successful!"
   684→                else
   685→                  echo "⚠️ External health check warning (may be expected for new setup)"
   686→                fi
   687→
   688→          - task: Bash@3
   689→            displayName: 'Notify Deployment Success'
   690→            condition: succeeded()
   691→            inputs:
   692→              targetType: 'inline'
   693→              script: |
   694→                echo "=========================================="
   695→                echo "Production Deployment Summary"
   696→                echo "=========================================="
   697→                echo "Completed at: $(date)"
   698→                echo "Build: $(Build.BuildNumber)"
   699→                echo "Commit: $(Build.SourceVersion)"
   700→                echo "=========================================="
   701→                echo ""
   702→                echo "API:  https://api.bizbio.co.za"
   703→                echo "UI:   https://www.snaptap.co.za"
   704→                echo "=========================================="
   705→

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

# Azure DevOps Pipeline for BizBio
# This pipeline builds, tests, and deploys both:
# - BizBio ASP.NET Core API
# - SnapTap/BizBio Nuxt UI

trigger:
  branches:
    include:
    - main
    - develop
    - feature/*
  paths:
    exclude:
    - README.md
    - docs/*
    - .github/*

pr:
  branches:
    include:
    - main
    - develop

variables:
  # API Variables
  buildConfiguration: 'Release'
  dotnetVersion: '8.x'
  projectPath: 'src/BizBio.API/BizBio.API.csproj'
  solutionPath: 'BizBio.sln'

  # UI Variables
  nodeVersion: '20.x'
  uiWorkingDirectory: '$(Build.SourcesDirectory)/src/BizBio.UI'

  # Deployment Variables
  uiTargetDirectory: '/var/www/snaptap/ui'

# ============================================================================
# STAGE: BUILD
# ============================================================================
stages:
- stage: Build
  displayName: 'Build and Test'
  jobs:
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # JOB: Build API
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - job: BuildAPI
    displayName: 'Build API'
    pool:
      vmImage: 'ubuntu-latest'

    steps:
    - task: UseDotNet@2
      displayName: 'Install .NET SDK'
      inputs:
        version: $(dotnetVersion)
        includePreviewVersions: false

    - task: DotNetCoreCLI@2
      displayName: 'Restore Dependencies'
      inputs:
        command: 'restore'
        projects: '$(solutionPath)'

    - task: DotNetCoreCLI@2
      displayName: 'Build Solution'
      inputs:
        command: 'build'
        projects: '$(solutionPath)'
        arguments: '--configuration $(buildConfiguration) --no-restore'

    # Uncomment when tests are added
    # - task: DotNetCoreCLI@2
    #   displayName: 'Run Tests'
    #   inputs:
    #     command: 'test'
    #     projects: '**/*Tests/*.csproj'
    #     arguments: '--configuration $(buildConfiguration) --no-build --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage"'

    - task: DotNetCoreCLI@2
      displayName: 'Publish API'
      inputs:
        command: 'publish'
        publishWebProjects: false
        projects: '$(projectPath)'
        arguments: '--configuration $(buildConfiguration) --output $(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)/api --no-build'
        zipAfterPublish: true

    - task: CopyFiles@2
      displayName: 'Copy Deployment Scripts'
      inputs:
        SourceFolder: '$(System.DefaultWorkingDirectory)'
        Contents: |
          deploy/**
        TargetFolder: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)'

    - task: PublishBuildArtifacts@1
      displayName: 'Publish API Artifacts'
      inputs:
        PathtoPublish: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)'
        ArtifactName: 'api-build'
        publishLocation: 'Container'

  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # JOB: Build UI
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - job: BuildUI
    displayName: 'Build UI'
    pool:
      vmImage: 'ubuntu-latest'

    steps:
    - task: NodeTool@0
      displayName: 'Install Node.js $(nodeVersion)'
      inputs:
        versionSpec: $(nodeVersion)

    - task: Cache@2
      displayName: 'Cache node_modules'
      inputs:
        key: 'npm | "$(Agent.OS)" | $(uiWorkingDirectory)/package-lock.json'
        path: '$(uiWorkingDirectory)/node_modules'
        restoreKeys: |
          npm | "$(Agent.OS)"

    - script: |
        cd $(uiWorkingDirectory)
        npm ci
      displayName: 'Install Dependencies'

    - script: |
        cd $(uiWorkingDirectory)
        npm run build
      displayName: 'Build Application'
      env:
        NODE_ENV: production

    # Verify build output
    - script: |
        echo "=== Build Output Structure ==="
        ls -la $(uiWorkingDirectory)/.output/
        echo "=== Public folder ==="
        ls -la $(uiWorkingDirectory)/.output/public/ | head -20
        echo "=== Profile Assets ==="
        ls -la $(uiWorkingDirectory)/.output/public/profile-assets/ || echo "profile-assets not found"
      displayName: 'Verify Build Output'

    # Archive the .output directory
    - task: ArchiveFiles@2
      displayName: 'Archive Build Output'
      inputs:
        rootFolderOrFile: '$(uiWorkingDirectory)/.output'
        includeRootFolder: false
        archiveType: 'zip'
        archiveFile: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)/ui.zip'
        replaceExistingArchive: true

    # Copy ecosystem config
    - task: CopyFiles@2
      displayName: 'Copy ecosystem.config.cjs'
      inputs:
        SourceFolder: '$(uiWorkingDirectory)'
        Contents: 'ecosystem.config.cjs'
        TargetFolder: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)/config'

    # Copy nginx config
    - task: CopyFiles@2
      displayName: 'Copy Nginx Config'
      inputs:
        SourceFolder: '$(uiWorkingDirectory)/nginx'
        Contents: '*.conf'
        TargetFolder: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)/config/nginx'

    # Copy deployment scripts
    - task: CopyFiles@2
      displayName: 'Copy Deployment Scripts'
      inputs:
        SourceFolder: '$(uiWorkingDirectory)/scripts'
        Contents: '*.sh'
        TargetFolder: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)/scripts'

    # Publish artifacts
    - task: PublishBuildArtifacts@1
      displayName: 'Publish UI Artifacts'
      inputs:
        PathtoPublish: '$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)'
        ArtifactName: 'ui-build'
        publishLocation: 'Container'

# ============================================================================
# STAGE: Deploy to Development
# ============================================================================
- stage: DeployDev
  displayName: 'Deploy to Development'
  dependsOn: Build
  condition: and(succeeded(), eq(variables['Build.SourceBranch'], 'refs/heads/develop'))
  jobs:
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # JOB: Deploy API to Dev
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - deployment: DeployAPIDev
    displayName: 'Deploy API to Dev'
    environment: 'Development'
    pool:
      vmImage: 'ubuntu-latest'
    strategy:
      runOnce:
        deploy:
          steps:
          - task: DownloadBuildArtifacts@0
            displayName: 'Download API Artifacts'
            inputs:
              buildType: 'current'
              downloadType: 'single'
              artifactName: 'api-build'
              downloadPath: '$(System.ArtifactsDirectory)'

          - task: Bash@3
            displayName: 'Deploy API via SSH'
            inputs:
              targetType: 'inline'
              script: |
                # Install SSH key
                mkdir -p ~/.ssh
                echo "$(SSH_PRIVATE_KEY)" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                ssh-keyscan -H $(VPS_HOST) >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

                # Create deployment directory on VPS
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) "mkdir -p /tmp/bizbio-deploy"

                # Copy artifacts to VPS
                scp -r $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/api-build/api/* $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):/tmp/bizbio-deploy/

                # Execute deployment script on VPS
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) << 'ENDSSH'
                  set -e

                  # Stop the service
                  sudo systemctl stop bizbio-api || true

                  # Backup current deployment
                  if [ -d /var/www/bizbio-api ]; then
                    sudo cp -r /var/www/bizbio-api /var/www/bizbio-api.backup.$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
                  fi

                  # Deploy new version
                  sudo mkdir -p /var/www/bizbio-api
                  sudo unzip -o /tmp/bizbio-deploy/BizBio.API.zip -d /var/www/bizbio-api/

                  # Set permissions
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/bizbio-api
                  sudo chmod -R 755 /var/www/bizbio-api

                  # Ensure uploads directory exists
                  sudo mkdir -p /var/www/uploads
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/uploads

                  # Start the service
                  sudo systemctl start bizbio-api
                  sudo systemctl status bizbio-api

                  # Cleanup
                  rm -rf /tmp/bizbio-deploy
                ENDSSH

                # Verify deployment
                echo "Waiting for service to start..."
                sleep 10
                curl -f https://api.bizbio.co.za/health || exit 1
                echo "API Deployment successful!"

  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # JOB: Deploy UI to Dev
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - deployment: DeployUIDev
    displayName: 'Deploy UI to Dev'
    environment: 'Development'
    pool:
      vmImage: 'ubuntu-latest'
    strategy:
      runOnce:
        deploy:
          steps:
          - task: DownloadBuildArtifacts@0
            displayName: 'Download UI Artifacts'
            inputs:
              buildType: 'current'
              downloadType: 'single'
              artifactName: 'ui-build'
              downloadPath: '$(System.ArtifactsDirectory)'

          - task: Bash@3
            displayName: 'Deploy UI via SSH'
            inputs:
              targetType: 'inline'
              script: |
                # Install SSH key
                mkdir -p ~/.ssh
                echo "$(SSH_PRIVATE_KEY)" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                ssh-keyscan -H $(VPS_HOST) >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

                RELEASE_ID=$(Build.BuildId)
                TARGET_DIR="$(uiTargetDirectory)"

                # Create release directory
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) "mkdir -p ${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}"

                # Upload artifacts
                scp $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/ui-build/ui.zip $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}/
                scp $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/ui-build/config/ecosystem.config.cjs $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}/ 2>/dev/null || true
                scp $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/ui-build/config/nginx/*.conf $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}/ 2>/dev/null || true

                # Execute deployment
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) << ENDSSH
                  set -e

                  TARGET_DIR="${TARGET_DIR}"
                  RELEASE_ID="${RELEASE_ID}"
                  RELEASE_DIR="\${TARGET_DIR}/releases/\${RELEASE_ID}"

                  echo "=========================================="
                  echo "SnapTap UI Dev Deployment - Release \${RELEASE_ID}"
                  echo "=========================================="

                  # Extract build
                  cd \${RELEASE_DIR}
                  unzip -q ui.zip -d ui-build
                  rm ui.zip

                  # Update ecosystem config
                  if [ -f "\${RELEASE_DIR}/ecosystem.config.cjs" ]; then
                    cp \${RELEASE_DIR}/ecosystem.config.cjs \${TARGET_DIR}/ecosystem.config.cjs
                  fi

                  # Backup current
                  if [ -L \${TARGET_DIR}/current ]; then
                    sudo rm -dfr \${TARGET_DIR}/previous || true
                    mv \${TARGET_DIR}/current \${TARGET_DIR}/previous
                  fi

                  # Create symlink
                  sudo ln -sfn \${RELEASE_DIR}/ui-build/. \${TARGET_DIR}/current

                  # Set permissions
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data \${TARGET_DIR}/current

                  # Ensure directories exist
                  mkdir -p \${TARGET_DIR}/profiles
                  mkdir -p \${TARGET_DIR}/logs

                  # Reload PM2
                  cd \${TARGET_DIR}
                  if pm2 list | grep -q "snaptap-frontend"; then
                    pm2 reload ecosystem.config.cjs --only snaptap-frontend --env production
                  else
                    pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --only snaptap-frontend --env production
                  fi
                  pm2 save

                  # Cleanup old releases (keep last 5)
                  cd \${TARGET_DIR}/releases
                  ls -dt */ | tail -n +6 | xargs -r rm -rf

                  echo "Dev deployment complete!"
                ENDSSH

                # Verify
                sleep 5
                echo "UI Dev Deployment complete!"

# ============================================================================
# STAGE: Deploy to Production
# ============================================================================
- stage: DeployProd
  displayName: 'Deploy to Production'
  dependsOn: Build
  condition: and(succeeded(), eq(variables['Build.SourceBranch'], 'refs/heads/main'))
  jobs:
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # JOB: Deploy API to Production
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - deployment: DeployAPIProd
    displayName: 'Deploy API to Production'
    environment: 'Production'
    pool:
      vmImage: 'ubuntu-latest'
    strategy:
      runOnce:
        deploy:
          steps:
          - task: DownloadBuildArtifacts@0
            displayName: 'Download API Artifacts'
            inputs:
              buildType: 'current'
              downloadType: 'single'
              artifactName: 'api-build'
              downloadPath: '$(System.ArtifactsDirectory)'

          - task: Bash@3
            displayName: 'Deploy API to Production VPS'
            inputs:
              targetType: 'inline'
              script: |
                # Install SSH key
                mkdir -p ~/.ssh
                echo "$(SSH_PRIVATE_KEY)" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                ssh-keyscan -H $(VPS_HOST) >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

                # Create deployment directory on VPS
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) "mkdir -p /tmp/bizbio-deploy"

                # Copy artifacts to VPS
                scp -r $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/api-build/api/* $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):/tmp/bizbio-deploy/

                # Execute deployment script on VPS
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) << 'ENDSSH'
                  set -e

                  echo "Starting API deployment to Production..."

                  # Stop the service
                  sudo systemctl stop bizbio-api || true

                  # Backup current deployment
                  if [ -d /var/www/bizbio-api ]; then
                    sudo cp -r /var/www/bizbio-api /var/www/bizbio-api.backup.$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)

                    # Keep only last 5 backups
                    cd /var/www
                    ls -t bizbio-api.backup.* 2>/dev/null | tail -n +6 | xargs -r sudo rm -rf
                  fi

                  # Deploy new version
                  sudo mkdir -p /var/www/bizbio-api
                  sudo unzip -o /tmp/bizbio-deploy/BizBio.API.zip -d /var/www/bizbio-api/

                  # Set permissions
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/bizbio-api
                  sudo chmod -R 755 /var/www/bizbio-api

                  # Ensure uploads directory exists
                  sudo mkdir -p /var/www/uploads
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/uploads

                  # Run database migrations
                  echo "Running database migrations..."
                  cd /var/www/bizbio-api
                  # sudo -u www-data dotnet BizBio.API.dll ef database update

                  # Start the service
                  echo "Starting bizbio-api service..."
                  sudo systemctl start bizbio-api

                  # Wait for service to start
                  sleep 5

                  # Check service status
                  sudo systemctl status bizbio-api --no-pager

                  # Cleanup
                  rm -rf /tmp/bizbio-deploy

                  echo "API Deployment completed successfully!"
                ENDSSH

                # Verify deployment
                echo "Verifying API deployment..."
                sleep 10

                # Test the API health endpoint
                if curl -f https://api.bizbio.co.za/health; then
                  echo "✅ API Production deployment successful!"
                else
                  echo "❌ API Health check failed!"
                  exit 1
                fi

  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # JOB: Deploy UI to Production
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - deployment: DeployUIProd
    displayName: 'Deploy UI to Production'
    environment: 'Production'
    pool:
      vmImage: 'ubuntu-latest'
    strategy:
      runOnce:
        deploy:
          steps:
          - task: DownloadBuildArtifacts@0
            displayName: 'Download UI Artifacts'
            inputs:
              buildType: 'current'
              downloadType: 'single'
              artifactName: 'ui-build'
              downloadPath: '$(System.ArtifactsDirectory)'

          - task: Bash@3
            displayName: 'Deploy UI to Production VPS'
            inputs:
              targetType: 'inline'
              script: |
                # Install SSH key
                mkdir -p ~/.ssh
                echo "$(SSH_PRIVATE_KEY)" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
                ssh-keyscan -H $(VPS_HOST) >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts

                RELEASE_ID=$(Build.BuildId)
                TARGET_DIR="$(uiTargetDirectory)"

                echo "=========================================="
                echo "SnapTap UI Production Deployment"
                echo "Release: ${RELEASE_ID}"
                echo "=========================================="

                # Create release directory
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) "mkdir -p ${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}"

                # Upload artifacts
                echo ">>> Uploading build artifacts..."
                scp $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/ui-build/ui.zip $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}/

                # Upload configs
                scp $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/ui-build/config/ecosystem.config.cjs $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}/ 2>/dev/null || true
                scp $(System.ArtifactsDirectory)/ui-build/config/nginx/*.conf $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST):${TARGET_DIR}/releases/${RELEASE_ID}/ 2>/dev/null || true

                # Execute deployment
                ssh $(VPS_USER)@$(VPS_HOST) << ENDSSH
                  set -e

                  TARGET_DIR="${TARGET_DIR}"
                  RELEASE_ID="${RELEASE_ID}"
                  RELEASE_DIR="\${TARGET_DIR}/releases/\${RELEASE_ID}"

                  echo "=========================================="
                  echo "Deploying Release \${RELEASE_ID}"
                  echo "=========================================="

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 1. Extract build artifact
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Extracting build artifact..."
                  cd \${RELEASE_DIR}
                  unzip -q ui.zip -d ui-build
                  rm ui.zip

                  echo ">>> Build contents:"
                  ls -la \${RELEASE_DIR}/ui-build/

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 2. Update Nginx configuration
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Checking Nginx configuration..."
                  if [ -f "\${RELEASE_DIR}/snaptap.co.za.conf" ]; then
                    echo ">>> Updating Nginx config..."
                    sudo cp \${RELEASE_DIR}/snaptap.co.za.conf /etc/nginx/sites-available/snaptap.co.za
                    sudo nginx -t
                    if [ \$? -eq 0 ]; then
                      sudo systemctl reload nginx
                      echo ">>> Nginx configuration updated and reloaded"
                    else
                      echo ">>> ERROR: Nginx config test failed, keeping old config"
                      exit 1
                    fi
                  else
                    echo ">>> No nginx config in release, keeping existing"
                  fi

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 3. Update ecosystem.config.cjs
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Updating PM2 ecosystem config..."
                  if [ -f "\${RELEASE_DIR}/ecosystem.config.cjs" ]; then
                    cp \${RELEASE_DIR}/ecosystem.config.cjs \${TARGET_DIR}/ecosystem.config.cjs
                    echo ">>> Ecosystem config updated"
                  fi

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 4. Backup current release
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Managing release symlinks..."
                  if [ -L \${TARGET_DIR}/current ]; then
                    CURRENT_TARGET=\$(readlink \${TARGET_DIR}/current)
                    echo ">>> Current points to: \${CURRENT_TARGET}"
                    echo ">>> Backing up current to previous..."
                    sudo rm -dfr \${TARGET_DIR}/previous || true
                    mv \${TARGET_DIR}/current \${TARGET_DIR}/previous
                  fi

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 5. Create symlink to new release
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Creating symlink to new release..."
                  sudo ln -sfn \${RELEASE_DIR}/ui-build/. \${TARGET_DIR}/current

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 6. Set permissions
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Setting permissions..."
                  sudo chown -R www-data:www-data \${TARGET_DIR}/current

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 7. Ensure profiles directory exists
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Ensuring profiles directory exists..."
                  if [ ! -d "\${TARGET_DIR}/profiles" ]; then
                    sudo mkdir -p \${TARGET_DIR}/profiles
                    sudo chown -R www-data:www-data \${TARGET_DIR}/profiles
                    echo ">>> Created profiles directory"
                  fi

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 8. Ensure logs directory exists
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Ensuring logs directory exists..."
                  mkdir -p \${TARGET_DIR}/logs

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 9. Reload PM2
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Reloading PM2..."
                  cd \${TARGET_DIR}

                  if pm2 list | grep -q "snaptap-frontend"; then
                    pm2 reload ecosystem.config.cjs --only snaptap-frontend --env production
                  else
                    pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --only snaptap-frontend --env production
                  fi
                  pm2 save

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 10. Cleanup old releases (keep last 5)
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Cleaning up old releases..."
                  cd \${TARGET_DIR}/releases
                  ls -dt */ | tail -n +6 | xargs -r rm -rf
                  echo ">>> Remaining releases:"
                  ls -la \${TARGET_DIR}/releases/

                  # --------------------------------------------
                  # 11. Verify deployment
                  # --------------------------------------------
                  echo ">>> Verifying deployment..."
                  sleep 3

                  # Check if app is responding
                  HTTP_CODE=\$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3001/ || echo "000")
                  if [ "\$HTTP_CODE" = "200" ]; then
                    echo ">>> Application is responding (HTTP \${HTTP_CODE})"
                  else
                    echo ">>> WARNING: Application returned HTTP \${HTTP_CODE}"
                    echo ">>> Checking PM2 logs..."
                    pm2 logs snaptap-frontend --lines 20 --nostream
                  fi

                  # Check static asset
                  ASSET_CODE=\$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3001/profile-assets/bizbio-engine.js || echo "000")
                  if [ "\$ASSET_CODE" = "200" ]; then
                    echo ">>> Profile assets are accessible (HTTP \${ASSET_CODE})"
                  else
                    echo ">>> WARNING: Profile assets returned HTTP \${ASSET_CODE}"
                  fi

                  echo "=========================================="
                  echo "UI Deployment Complete!"
                  echo "=========================================="
                  echo "Release: \${RELEASE_ID}"
                  echo "Current: \${TARGET_DIR}/current -> \$(readlink \${TARGET_DIR}/current)"
                  echo "=========================================="
                  pm2 status snaptap-frontend
                ENDSSH

                # Final verification from outside
                echo ">>> Final verification..."
                sleep 5

                if curl -sf https://www.snaptap.co.za/ > /dev/null; then
                  echo "✅ SnapTap UI Production deployment successful!"
                else
                  echo "⚠️ External health check warning (may be expected for new setup)"
                fi

          - task: Bash@3
            displayName: 'Notify Deployment Success'
            condition: succeeded()
            inputs:
              targetType: 'inline'
              script: |
                echo "=========================================="
                echo "Production Deployment Summary"
                echo "=========================================="
                echo "Completed at: $(date)"
                echo "Build: $(Build.BuildNumber)"
                echo "Commit: $(Build.SourceVersion)"
                echo "=========================================="
                echo ""
                echo "API:  https://api.bizbio.co.za"
                echo "UI:   https://www.snaptap.co.za"
                echo "=========================================="
